notes: 修复:多账号同时刷新会触发限流(改为逐个请求+自动退避);被限流或登录失效的 Claude 账号,卡片上可一键「重新登录」立即恢复。界面改为纯中文。更新后如提示重新授权钥匙串,属未签名正常现象。
notes_en: Fixes: refreshing multiple accounts at once could trigger rate limiting (requests are now serialized with automatic backoff); rate-limited or signed-out Claude accounts can be recovered instantly via a one-click re-sign-in on the card. Note: the UI is now Chinese-only. If macOS re-prompts for Keychain access after updating, that's expected for an unsigned build.
